creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #3)

Yes, if NO_ARCH is present poudriere complains about it in the install phase with the following message:

pkg-static: DEVELOPER_MODE: Error: arch "FreeBSD:12:* -- package installs architecture specific files

(Of course this error is relative to 12.1-RELEASE and I get "FreeBSD:11:*" on 11.3-RELEASE instead.)
